function.name: prescreening_complete
function.description: Use ONLY at the end of a prescreening call, immediately after the participant has answered the final screening question (Q12: piped water). Do NOT use during an interview call. Do NOT speak any closing words yourself first — the tool's request-complete message contains the full closing text and will be spoken verbatim by the voice platform, which then ends the call automatically.

messages.content: Thank you so much for your time. If you are selected for the interview, we will call you back. Goodbye.
